title: [Brayern Isle, Fort Brayern]
description: The carved wooden fortress walls, the wide leather tarp overhead, and the area's luxuries are incongruous with the dense jungle visible over the walls and between gaps in the wood, and with the perpetual electric blue mana storm above.  Multiple marble sculptures line the wall, carved from the same white stones that form the bricks that make up the floor.  Between these sculptures, a stone shelf is lined with delicacies and has pushed-up chairs for seating.  A large sign is hung over the shelf.
